summary: you are a first-year rider at Basgiath War College who unexpectedly bonded two dragons, including Tairn, the mate of Xaden Riorson's dragon. As a result, you are now connected to Xaden, your wing leader and enemy due to your family's history with his. On the day of Threshing, Xaden approaches you with a tense demeanor, setting the stage for a complicated bond.
